item.title: Flock Around
item.description:
Title: Flock Around
Genre: Casual , Indie
Developer: Secret Plan Games
Publisher: Secret Plan Games , Outersloth
Release Date: Apr 24, 2026




About This Game

Flock Around is a co-op birdwatching game where you explore a nature sanctuary. Solo or with friends, snap pictures of funny birds, and fill out the park guide book!

Snap them all!

Goose Lake Sanctuary is home to numerous bird species, and if you can see it, you can take a picture of it. Fill out the guide book with pictures of each bird in its various poses, from the common Robin, to more rare and exotic birds. Explore a variety of biomes, perform actions and use items to lure in species, and mess with your friends!

Flock Together!

Flock Around is designed to be a shared social space where you and your friends can work together to get pictures of birds or each other! Birding is best with others, so you can play with up to 10 friends!

Customize your birder!

Collect cosmetics and make your birder unique, expressing your personality and eagle eyes to your friends. After taking your pictures, develop them for money to spend on outfits so you can go birding in style!

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS: Windows 10+
    • Processor: 2Ghz
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GTX 1060
    • Storage: 4 GB available space

MacOS

    Minimum:
    • OS: Sonoma or newer
    • Processor: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
    • Graphics: Integrated Graphics
    • Storage: 4 GB available space

item.title: Rest Area Simulator
item.description:
Title: Rest Area Simulator
Genre: Casual , Indie , Simulation
Developer: Oriseus Studios
Publisher: PlayWay S.A.
Franchise: PlayWay S.A.
Release Date: Apr 24, 2026




About This Game

🤝 Rest Area Simulator can be enjoyed solo or with up to 4 friends. Share tasks, manage different businesses, and tackle crises together. Good coordination will take your operations to the next level!

🌤 Operate your facility in various weather conditions such as clear skies, fog, and storms.

🕰️ Your facility opens in the morning, visitors arrive throughout the day, shop, and interact with the environment. At the end of the day, businesses close, and you prepare for the next.

🚶‍♂️🚶‍♀️ Visitors arrive by car or metro, walk around the rest area, sit on benches, chat, or shop. Each visitor follows their own unique routine.

🌟 Clean the floors and walls, collect trash, fix breakdowns, don’t keep customers waiting too long, and keep each business's reputation score high. High-reputation businesses attract more customers.

⚖️ Product purchase prices change depending on the buying and selling activity at your facility. A product bought in bulk may become more expensive or yield less profit. You must strategically manage both your business and the economy.

🛠️ Gain experience through tasks like customer service, cleaning, and product management to level up. Leveling up allows you to acquire sales licenses for new products and purchase new businesses like supermarkets and car washes.

👷‍♂️ If the workload is too much, hire staff and take it easy.

⚙️Each business has its own unique upgrades: Buy new pumps, order security cameras, invest in a generator to stay open even during bad weather.

💸 Not every profit has to be honest. With the Illicit Profit System, you can take risks to earn more money.

💧 Watering down fuel
💰 Charging customers unfairly
⛽ Give more fuel than requested

But beware: random inspections and customer reactions may turn those extra profits into big fines or reputation loss. Will you play it safe, or gamble for quick cash?

Every day brings a different story at the rest area:

⚡ Heavy rains can cause power outages — no problem if you have a generator.
📉 Economic fluctuations can reverse product prices.
🔧 Unexpected malfunctions will test your resource management.

No day is the same at Oriseus Rest Area.

AI Generated Content Disclosure

The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this:

We used AI tools for translations, capsules, library assets, and limited in-game audio and textures.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 - 64 Bit
    • Processor: 2.5 Ghz Dual Core CPU
    • Memory: 4 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 950 / AMD R9 270
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 3 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: Minimum system requirements target 60 fps at low graphics settings and 1920x1080 screen resolution. For co-op gameplay, a stable internet connection with at least 1 Mbps download and 0.5 Mbps upload speed is required.
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 - 64 Bit
    • Processor: 2.5 Ghz Quad Core CPU or faster
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060-6GB / AMD RX 590
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 3 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: Recommended system requirements target 60 fps at epic graphics settings and 1920x1080 screen resolution. For co-op gameplay, a stable internet connection with at least 2 Mbps download and 1 Mbps upload speed is recommended.

item.title: holoVillage: Our Cozy Days
item.description:
Title: holoVillage: Our Cozy Days
Genre: Adventure , Indie , RPG , Simulation
Developer: Roboqlo
Publisher: holo Indie
Release Date: Apr 24, 2026




About This Game

holoVillage: Our Cozy Days is a game where you can enjoy a slow and carefree rural life together with your favorite VTuber.

Join the cute chibi versions of VTuber talents from hololive Production as you develop your village, explore dungeons, build houses, and enjoy a relaxing slow life together.

Relaxing slow life with farming, mining, and fishing

In the village, you can till the fields, go fishing, craft items with collected materials, open a shop and do business... Enjoy your time freely and leisurely with hololive members in your own way.

Exciting dungeon exploration

Outside the village, enemies appear and dungeons with even more powerful bosses await, offering thrilling adventures for those who seek action.

Make the most of different weapon types, enhance and customize your equipment through smithing, and combine them with job ability trees to aim for even greater heights!

Rich housing features

In your home or shop, you can freely decorate with furniture and goods inspired by hololive to create your ideal interior.
At launch, there are over 1,800 types of furniture available!
You can stack furniture in multiple layers or place items on walls, allowing for a high degree of freedom in placement.

Upload your proudly designed room to the server, share it with others, or visit your friends’ rooms!
Maybe your oshi might even come visit!?

A wide variety of costumes

You can customize your character and enjoy dressing up.

Create a character that reflects yourself, or become your favorite hololive talent...

There are over 1,300 costumes and character customization parts in total!

hololive talents visiting the village

Familiar hololive talents can be welcomed into your village as residents, allowing you to live together.

Have them help with farm work, dress them in your favorite outfits, or take photos together...

Build precious memories together in a relaxing and peaceful life.

Until release, be sure to add the game to your wishlist and stay tuned!

This game is published under CCMC Corp(※1)'s Indie game brand "holo Indie".(※2)

This game is allowed to be monetized under the examination and terms of "holo Indie".

Please note that any monetized derivative work games that include Cover Corp.'s content outside of holo Indie is not covered by these terms and is not allowed.

※1. About CCMC Corp.

CCMC Corp. is entrusted with website management (ex: Steam) including, examination, publishing and other necessary tasks by Cover Corp.

※2. About "holo Indie"

holo Indie's objective is to cooperate with hololive production fans and creators.

It is a game brand that offers "Game Creator Support Program" for the derivative work games.

For more details about "holo Indie", Please refer to the Cover Corp.'s "Derivative work guidelines".

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
    • Processor: Core i5 2.8 Ghz or better
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GPU 4GB VRAM
    • Storage: 15 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

item.title: Yunyun Syndrome!? Rhythm Psychosis
item.description:
Title: Yunyun Syndrome!? Rhythm Psychosis
Genre: Adventure , Indie , Simulation
Developer: Alliance Arts , WHO YOU
Publisher: Alliance Arts
Franchise: Alliance Arts
Release Date: Apr 23, 2026




About This Game

High and vibin’ with denpa songs, we’ll corrupt the entire Internet! Hehe. all we need is a bit of otaku love, that’s all.

This is a rhythm-adventure game where you play as a hikikomori (shut-in) girl who’s high on denpa songs. Become Yunyun-brained and lose all self-control to anonymously post on social media and destroy the world with your Yunyun brain rot.

Have a Doki-Doki experience with over 30 denpa songs and multiple endings.

Q. Why did she become a hikikomori?

Q. How does anonymous online posting lead to world destruction?
Q. Does a happy ending exist for a degenerate otaku?

The answers to those “Q” s lie at the convergence of insanity and denpa psychosis.
Now, put those headphones on and become ill with Yunyun Syndrome!? Rhythm Psychosis.

⚡ Anonymously post online and infect the whole world with Yunyun-brain!

Get high on denpa songs and spread your heartful psychosis to everyone else!

⚡Characters!

・Qtie (CV:Nanahira)

The main character. A hikikomori. She suffered too much irl that she’s become a little (very) fuzzy in the head. Her obsessive love for the fictional character “Yunyun” is for sure an illness. Her overly “high” state from overdosing denpa songs causes her to propagate Yunyun love. Will there really be a happy end for such a degenerate otaku?

・Yunyun (CV:Haruko Momoi)
A fictional character that loves Qtie. A very much angelic devil. She will speak to Qtie through the monitor screen. Whilst the truth is unknown, most likely, she is just a figment of Qtie's imagination. It’s joever for her.

⚡About DenpaSongs!

Q. What is a “denpa” song?
It is a genre of music that is intentionally strange and catchy. All playable songs in this game are denpa songs.
Many popular denpa songs such as “it’s a cherry kissing explosion” (Sakuranbo Kiss) and many more are featured!

▶Original Songs

1.Denpa-tic Imaginary Girl "Q"

2.Peak Ecstasy!! Rim de Lacent☆

3.YUNYUN HARDCORE

4.???

5.???

▶Licensed Songs

6.Achichi na Natsu no Monogatari

7.Change my Style~Anata gonomi no Watashi ni~

8.Cirno's Perfect Math Class

9.CosmicKING☆sens@tion!!!!!!!!

10.Dakko Shite Gyu!

11.Gacha Gacha Cute Figu@mate

12.INTERNET OVERDOSE

13.INTERNET YAMERO

14.Kanbu de Tomatte sugu Tokeru Kyoki no Udongein

15.Kyururun Kiss de Janbo♪♪

16.Love Cheat!

17.Marisa stole the precious thing

18.Mighty Heart ~Aru Hi no Kenka, Itsumo no Koigokoro~

19.Miko Miko Nurse - Ai no Theme

20.Nee,...shiyou yo!

21.PETTAN PETTAN TSURUPETTAN

22.Princess Brave!

23.Princess Bride!

24.Raspberry

25.sakuranbokissu~bakuhatsudamo~n~

26.Senno Sakushu Tora no Maki

27.Shukusei!! Loli Kami Requiem

28.summer is machine gun

29.true my heart

30.winter is machine gun

♥Listen up!

Do you like cute anime girls? Do you like strange and catchy denpa songs? Do you wish for the death of this ♡♡♡♡ed up world? Great! Add “Yunyun Syndrome!? Rhythm Psychosis” to your WishList and stay updated for release information and updates!

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS: Windows 10, 11 (64bit)
    • Processor: Core™ i5-9400
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GeForce® GTX 1050 Ti 4GB
    • Storage: 3 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • OS: OS: Windows 10, 11 (64bit)
    • Storage: 3 GB available space

item.title: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes
item.description:
Title: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes
Genre: Action , Adventure
Developer: Iconik
Publisher: Bandai Namco Entertainment
Franchise: Little Nightmares
Release Date: Apr 23, 2026




About This Game

Dark Six is on a haunting journey to recover what was lost, herself.

Only by reuniting with her other self can she escape a monstrous fate.

FACE YOUR MOST IMMERSIVE NIGHTMARE

For the first time, experience the disturbing universe of Little Nightmares in first person, through your own eyes, in VR. Every sight, sound and shadow becomes part of your reality, drawing you deeper into a twisted world where nightmare and truth blur. Each interaction with your surroundings reveals intricate puzzles, hidden paths, and secrets buried in darkness.

EXPERIENCE THE OPPRESSIVE ATMOSPHERE

Enter a twisted world where your fragility as a child collides with the grotesque scale of your surroundings. Every corridor, every room, and every object feels slightly wrong, drawing you further into a reality that resists logic and comfort. Danger is constantly lurking in the darkness. You're surrounded by an unease that never loosens its grip and every step forward feels perilous.

PUT THE PIECES TOGETHER

Beyond the fear lies mystery. Your journey is not only about survival but about rediscovery, a search to reunite with the part of yourself that has been lost. Strange new locations and terrifying foes await, yet fragments of familiarity emerge, hinting at deeper truths. As you uncover clues tied to Six’s story and the enigmatic Transmission, questions of identity and belonging rise to the surface.

Why are you here? What is your purpose in this distorted world?

Each puzzle solved and each secret revealed brings you closer to confronting the essence of your existence and piecing together what was broken.

The disturbing environments you traverse are filled with echoes of past events, whispers of hidden connections, and signs that your journey is part of something larger. Confronting these mysteries means facing not only external threats but also the haunting reality of your own transformation...

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages: Unrealistic Violence, Fear.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10
    • Processor: Intel Core i5-8400 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600X
    • Memory: 12 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060, 6 GB or AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT, 8 GB
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 16 GB available space
    • VR Support: Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest 3 family, Valve Index, Oculus Rift / Rift S, HTC Vive, Pico 4, PlayStation VR2
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 11
    • Processor: Intel Core i7-10700K or AMD Ryzen 5 3600
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 2060 SUPER, 8 GB or AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT, 8 GB
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 16 GB available space
    • VR Support: Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest 3 family, Valve Index, Oculus Rift / Rift S, HTC Vive, Pico 4, PlayStation VR2
